final:
module RefModule(
   input           clk,
   input           rst,
   input [15:0]    PI,
   input           load,
   output [15:0]   PO  
);
    reg [15:0] Q;
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if(rst) Q <= 16'b0; // Reset the register
        else if(load) Q <= PI; // Load parallel input
    end
    
    assign PO = Q; // Parallel output is the current value of the register
endmodule
